title: 启用处理器功能限制 (LimitProcessorFeatures / LimitCPUID)
output:
Created VM: WMITEST_cpu_compat path=...Msvm_ComputerSystem.Name="9462A950-145C-4E9B-B7A3-F916D9D34B4A"
Initial LimitProcessorFeatures=False LimitCPUID=False
ModifyResourceSettings rv=0
Readback LimitProcessorFeatures=True LimitCPUID=True
ASSERT_RESULT=PASS LimitProcessorFeatures=True LimitCPUID=True
Cleanup DestroySystem rv=4096
notes: LimitProcessorFeatures 与 LimitCPUID 为 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData 上的布尔属性，用于跨主机迁移时限制暴露给来宾的处理器功能集与 CPUID 位；可通过 ModifyResourceSettings 写入并读回生效。
修改走标准资源修改路径：取虚拟机的 VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData，设置属性后经 GetText(1) 序列化传入 ModifyResourceSettings。ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
读回需重新经 VSSD 遍历 GetRelated 取新的 ProcessorSettingData 实例，原句柄为旧快照，不会自动刷新。
相关属性 LimitProcessorFeaturesMode (uint8, DefaultMinimumFeatures / ClusterNodeCommonFeatures) 控制受限功能集的类型，本用例保持默认未修改。
相关属性自 build 9200 起提供。
notes_en: LimitProcessorFeatures and LimitCPUID are boolean properties on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData, used to limit the set of processor features and CPUID bits exposed to the guest during cross-host migration; they can be written and read back via ModifyResourceSettings.

The modification follows the standard resource modification path: obtain the virtual machine's VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData, set the properties, then serialize with GetText(1) and pass to ModifyResourceSettings. ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, and returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.
Reading back requires traversing the VSSD again via GetRelated to obtain a fresh ProcessorSettingData instance, because the original handle is a stale snapshot that does not refresh automatically.

The related property LimitProcessorFeaturesMode (uint8, DefaultMinimumFeatures / ClusterNodeCommonFeatures) controls the type of the limited feature set; this example leaves it at the default, unmodified.
The related properties have been provided since build 9200.
